title: HUNT Decoder v0 / Chained-Read Foundations
description: Pack 2 (Phase γ). Real HUNT (HUNT_THE_ADVANTAGE) base scenarios — two-beat chained reads where action 1 forces a defensive reaction and beat 2's choice exploits the new geometry. D1 ships the pre-set mismatch; D2 introduces the user-forced switch. Concept-level prerequisites live on the Academy lesson `chained-reads-intro`.
